reindex.title: Full Reindex
reindex.description: Trigger a full reindex with zero-downtime alias swap. All documents will be re-processed through the indexing pipeline.
reindex.errorExists: A reindex job is already running for this collection
reindex.errorSchemaRequired: Index has no schema fields configured
reindex.confirmDescription: This will create a new index version, stream all documents, and swap aliases. No downtime expected.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Manage search indexes, API keys and usage for this organization.
search.noIndexes: No search indexes yet. Create your first one to get started.
search.noIndexesDescription: Search indexes store your data and power search queries. Create one to get started.
search.selectIndex: Select an index to manage its API keys.

importJobsPage.title: Import Jobs
importJobsPage.description: Recent document import and sync activity from the ingest buffer.

createIndex.title: Create search index
createIndex.description: Provisions a search collection and alias scoped to this organization.
createIndex.slugHelp: Lowercase letters, digits and dashes. Used in API paths and as collection alias.
createIndex.schemaHelp: JSON array of field definitions. The 'tenant_id' field is added automatically.
createIndex.error: Could not create index. Please try again.
createIndex.errorsCount: {count, plural, one {# field has an error} other {# fields have errors}}
createIndex.noFields: No fields yet — add one or pick a template.
createIndex.noSortableHint: Enable Sort on a numeric field first
createIndex.tenantHint: tenant_id is added automatically for isolation.

tooltips.displayName: Human-readable name shown in the dashboard. Does not affect the API.
tooltips.slug: Used in API paths and as the search collection alias. Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only.
tooltips.fields: Define the columns of your search collection. Fields can be made facetable, sortable, or optional.
tooltips.facet: Allow users to filter and group by this field (e.g. categories, tags, brand).
tooltips.optional: The field is allowed to be missing on documents. Required fields must be present in every document.
tooltips.sort: Allow sorting on this field (numeric fields can always be sorted).
tooltips.defaultSort: Field used to order results when no explicit sort is given. Must be numeric.
tooltips.json: Edit the schema as raw JSON. Switching back to the visual builder validates and re-syncs your changes.
tooltips.idField: Recommended unique identifier. AACsearch uses this as the primary key for upserts.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Search keys are validated by our backend before queries are executed. Admin credentials never leave the server.
apiKeys.createDescription: The raw key is shown once. Store it securely.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.revealOnce: Copy this key now. You will not be able to see it again.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Create your first API key to start integrating search into your application.
apiKeys.revokeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to revoke "{name}"? Clients using this key will stop working immediately.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Track search usage, top queries, zero-results, and trends.
analytics.retentionBanner: Your {plan} plan retains analytics data for {days} days. Select a shorter period to see data.
analytics.noData: No data available for this period.
analytics.noDataDescription: Analytics data will appear once your search indexes start receiving queries.
analytics.noLatencyData: Latency data will appear after search queries are processed.
analytics.noFailedQueries: No failed queries in this period.

widget.description: Configure and customize your search widget. Set up filters, autocomplete, voice search, and embed it on your site.
widget.comingSoonDescription: The widget configuration wizard is being built. Check back soon for filters, autocomplete, voice search, and embed options.

configurator.pageDescription: Set up your search in 3 simple steps. Choose a data source, configure your schema, and fine-tune search behavior.
configurator.step1Description: Choose how to bring your data into AACSearch.
configurator.step2Description: Auto-detect fields and configure search, facet, and sort behavior.
configurator.step3Description: Fine-tune how search works: which fields are searchable, their weights, and ranking options.
configurator.sourceCSVDesc: Upload a CSV file with up to 500K rows. Column headers become fields.
configurator.sourceJSONDesc: Upload a JSON file with an array of objects.
configurator.sourceCMSDesc: Connect WordPress, WooCommerce, PrestaShop, or other CMS.
configurator.sourceAPIDesc: Push data programmatically via our REST API.
configurator.schemaEmptyHint: Upload a data source or click Auto-Detect to get started.
configurator.noStringFields: No text fields available. Add string-type fields to enable search.
configurator.facetNoneSelected: No facet fields configured. Click "Add all fields" to configure facets.
configurator.facetNoFieldsHint: Mark fields as Facet in the Schema step to enable facet configuration.
configurator.step4Description: Configure how search facets appear and behave. Reorder, rename, and set display options.

curations.description: Pin or hide products for specific search queries to manually control search results.

connector.subtitle: Connect PrestaShop, Bitrix, or push docs directly via API

configStep1.prestashop: Paste the API URL into the AACsearch module settings in your PrestaShop admin.
configStep1.bitrix: Paste the API URL into the AACsearch module settings in your Bitrix admin.
configStep1.directApi: Use the API URL and token as the base URL and bearer token for your REST calls.

configStep2.prestashop: Paste the connector token into the module settings field.
configStep2.bitrix: Paste the connector token into the module settings field.
configStep2.directApi: Include the token in the Authorization header: Bearer <token>

vectorSearch.description: Search by meaning, not just keywords.

hybridSearch.description: Combine keyword + semantic for best results.

semanticSearch.placeholder: Ask a question about your data...

models.description: Configure embedding models for vector and hybrid search.

geoSearch.description: Search by location with radius filtering.

conversationalSearch.description: Ask questions and get AI-generated answers from your data.

voiceSearch.description: Search by speaking. Audio is transcribed automatically.

imageSearch.description: Search by uploading an image. AI describes it before searching.

stemming.description: Manage stemming overrides for fine-grained text matching.

stopwords.description: Words in this list are ignored during search. Use it to filter out common words like articles and prepositions.
stopwords.title: Stopwords
stopwords.emptyDescription: Stopwords are common words ignored during search to improve relevance. Add words like 'the', 'a', 'in'.
stopwords.removeConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this stopword?

analyticsRules.description: Custom analytics rules for tracking search metrics.
analyticsRules.name: Name

dynamicSearch.description: Advanced search with dynamic sorting and result diversification.

rankingRules.title: Ranking Rules
rankingRules.description: Configure how search results are ranked and scored for this index.
rankingRules.fieldWeightsHint: Control how much each field contributes to the overall relevance score. Higher weight = more important.
rankingRules.noFieldsHint: Add string fields to the schema first to configure field weights.
rankingRules.generalSettingsHint: Configure typo tolerance, default sorting, and search modes.
rankingRules.customRulesHint: Advanced ranking expressions to override relevance scoring. Applied in order.
rankingRules.noCustomRulesHint: Add custom ranking expressions to fine-tune relevance scoring.

spellCorrection.title: Spell Correction
spellCorrection.description: Configure per-index spell correction settings. Control edit distance, language-specific options, and SymSpell behavior.
spellCorrection.error: Failed to save spell correction config.
spellCorrection.maxEditDistanceHint: Higher values catch more typos but may return irrelevant suggestions.
spellCorrection.splitCompoundsHint: Useful for German, Finnish and other compound-rich languages.
spellCorrection.useContextCorrectionHint: Use surrounding words to make better correction decisions.
